title: Adolf Lindenbaum
body: Adolf Lindenbaum (12 June 1904 – August 1941) was a Polish-Jewish logician and mathematician best known for Lindenbaum's lemma and Lindenbaum–Tarski algebras.
categories: Polish Jews who died in the Holocaust
